reviews.review_description: What a cool game! The very first thing What u have to do is get over a desk.... there is no jump.  And u has to put your palm in a scanner to get over the desk! BUT U CANT PUT YOUR GUNS AWAY!!!! how should u get over the first obstacle! Let me graduate for the genius developer,  yor game is truly unbeatable! Because u can't play it! Bravo! I want my 99cent back! I give to an alcoholic homeless instead to buy a drink!
Decent game. I've been a zombies fan since world at war. I'd say fix the diamonds. Add more maps and multiplayer and this would be gold

The gameplay itself is great! Physics are good, the shooting feels real nice. I love the variety of weapons and the upgrade system. Rounds can get very frantic, but never frustrating. 
That being said, the game doesn't save progress, there are only 2 maps and 2 game modes and this type of game desperately needs multiplayer. Looking at reviews from a few years ago, there used to be much more to this game; is it still being delevoped?
As it stands, it's great for a free experience, but it leaves you wanting more.

First I want to say I am beyond tired of VR games giving you as Little instruction as humanly possible to play their games. This game is fun but unless I'm just too stupid to understand it it doesn't work I went through a run collected $1,83 diamonds it says I need $1,000 to get an upgrade no matter what button I push no matter what I click no matter what I could not buy anything I had to get off recharge The Meta got back on I have zero diamonds if the people that made us think I'm going to go through all that every single time because nothing stays no setting stay the diamonds don't stay nothing you do stays nothing is saved what's the point of this game if you you know you got $2,000 diamonds you need and you can't spend them and if you even can figure out how to spend them if they're not going to stay there what good is it it's a free game so you know you're not losing any money but it doesn't work properly.
Rating would be a 5 & I'll Only Play This if They Ever Have Multiplayer So I Can Play With My Friend!! & It Needs More Maps!!

reviews.review_title: doesnt tell u how to open the door
reviews.review_description: first thing is a room with a door that doesn't open and there is no instructions on how to its just annoying frustrating
EVERYTHING ABOUT THIS GAME IS A BANGER

I was pleasantly surprised by how good the game is. It’s got a good frame rate although it does drop frame rate randomly but it’s pretty smooth and polished. For $FREE.99 it’s definitely worth trying.

I can't really play this game. The movement speed is too fast and the comfort settings aren't enough to mitigate the motion sickness. Besides thst the controls for doors and things sometimes just don't work at all. I want to give this game more of a chance but I can't even get out of the starting area.
I love playing this. Just a couple bugs gems don't register when buying upgrades. But I'd love to see any future updates. Keep up the work.
This game is so fun it really brings black ops call of duty and brings it to vr i think this game has great potential ( boards go to random places sometimes)

reviews.review_title: Needs an option to use teleport to move
reviews.review_description: This game has great graphics and is actually super fun so far. However, I did have to stop playing pretty early into the game because of motion sickness. I wish a teleport option could be added to help with the motion sickness. Otherwise a great game.
Love this game but if you exit the game it doesn't save your progress so inless you continue playing forever you'll never get past the first couple phases. Please fix it and I will change rating.

reviews.review_title: Fun game can't wait to see more added
reviews.review_description: Free....weapons are easy to use, needs more maps but I'm sure that's coming... I hope. Gun play is awesome the reload is a dope animation. Did I mention it's free.... Just in case u miss that part.....free
It’s fun but it won’t save my progress so I have to keep doing the tutorial every time I play but still fun
Add more COD like zombie maps!
If you have ever played Black ops 1. Then you would know that one of the maps is the theater room in Kin der toten
Fun and free  shooting is cool totally should get

Fun idea, keep chasing your vision! 

Feedback: Guns and hands feel funny and misaligned. Reload is annoying; let us use grip to hold the gun (most people's instinct) and just make the flick a lot less sensitive, or at least give us some other reload options. Also, I stood like a foot taller than I am :). I only played the first level and was left wondering the point of blocking the doors other than "something to do". It doesn't really change the rate at which they come in significantly so run and gun is just as effective? Maybe if you add faster enemies that blow up next to you there will be some more strategy to this but currently the enemies are so slow it doesn't really matter. Guns feel pretty good. 

Definitely a game made for multiplayer. :) Luckily these kinds of coop games lend themselves well to net code, and I find you get the best sense of shared reality by having players compute locally when they hit something and sending hit info to the server, then just living with the lag rather than trying to anticipate. Let me know if you want to discuss or see an example.

There's a surprising amount  of content in this free game - the gun game mode is a great way to discover how many guns there are, and they all shoot great. Did find a few bugs (Quest 3) that really made this hard to make 5 stars even with the price tag:
1. Sometimes (I think by pressing the oculus button) all guns and boxes stopped working, which means instant run stopper
2. When I logged back on two days later my progress was gone
3. When I won gun game on theatre I was rebuilding the barrier where the goal spawns - the goal cannot be accessed from behind and I was trapped and lost
Would at least recommend a download and checking in to see if the bug apply to you or if they are patched
I can see the appeal but man, moving with the joysticks in VR is absolutely not for me. First game I tried that made me nauseous. lol.

Cool zombie-killer! It has tons of guns, and even has gun upgrade features and character perks. I’ve played it a handful of times and can say that downloading this game is a no brainer.

It’s in beta, so I’ll try not to complain too much, but it doesn’t ever save my progress! This means each time I start the game, I have to play through the tutorial (there are skip buttons though), and I have zero diamonds and can never collect diamonds beyond that session. Because of this, a big part of the game’s mechanics (built around spending diamonds, buying perks, and increasing difficulty settings like “always runners”) are unattainable unless you play for 3+ hours straight without stopping. Once the save feature is added, I’ll be able to hoard those diamonds 🤲🏼💎🤲🏼 and really take off 🚀🚀🚀.

Thanks for the fun game!
If you are looking to play Call Of Duty zombie mode, stop looking and download this game. It’s a perfect replica, amazing graphics and mobility. I am looking forward for future updates and new maps.

This game is fun. I love all the guns and the mechanics. I love pack up punchy and I love the other stuff in this game and this game is just like call of duty zombies and this game will be much better if you add multiplayer in the future and if you add multiplayer, I will rate￼ this game a five star game and I still love this game and please add multiplayer if there’s is multiplayer and I didn’t see it. I will write another review and put it as five stars.

This game is called of duty zombies but animated. The game is really fun and you could play for hours.
